apps.name: Cartoon Weather
apps.subtitle: Animated Themes & Live Widgets
apps.description: A fun weather app with animated cartoon characters that react to real weather conditions. No boring static icons anymore.
apps.longDescription: Cartoon Weather transforms the everyday task of checking the weather into a delightful visual experience. Instead of static icons and plain numbers, you get beautiful full-screen animated characters that react to actual weather conditions. Choose from seven unique character themes, get accurate hourly and 7-day forecasts, air quality index, UV index, humidity, wind speed, and more. Customize your home screen with animated widgets and track weather for up to 5 locations. Privacy-focused with no ads and no tracking.
features: 7 unique animated character themes that react to real weather
Air quality index, UV index, humidity, and wind speed
Multi-location support for up to 5 cities
Push notifications for rain, snow, and severe weather

apps.name: Seasons: Solstice Tracker
apps.subtitle: Moon, Progress & Widgets
apps.description: See exactly where you stand in the year — season progress, solstice countdowns, moon phases, and beautiful animated themes.
apps.longDescription: Seasons shows exactly where you stand in the year — the percentage through your current season, days remaining, and the countdown to the next solstice or equinox. Track all 8 moon phases with illumination percentage, get location-based sunrise and sunset times, and visualize the year with a unique staggered dot grid. Choose from five hand-crafted animated themes, add widgets to your home screen, lock screen, and StandBy, and get notified when seasons change. Supports 85 countries, both hemispheres, and 6 languages.
features: Season progress with percentage and days remaining
All 8 moon phases with illumination percentage
Home screen, lock screen, and StandBy widgets
Season change notifications with customizable intervals
